facebook.content:
"The Lord has established His throne in heaven, and His kingdom rules over all." - Psalm 103:19

This verse isn't just a historical fact; it's a present reality. The Kingdom of God is not some distant utopia; it's the established authority in our lives today. What does it mean to you to have the Kingdom of God as your established authority?

facebook.pullQuote: The Kingdom of God is not some distant utopia; it's the established authority in our lives today.

instagram.content:
"Isaiah 9:7 — Of the increase of his government and peace there will be no end. 
We live in a world seeking stability and control, but the Kingdom of God offers a different kind of peace. It's a peace that comes from a government that is limitless and unstoppable.

What area of your life do you need to surrender to God's limitless government?
